blocks.text: CL showdown tonight — Mbappé out, Benfica eye the Bernabéu

Mbappé sits out tonight with a knee injury, handing Benfica genuine hope in the second leg. UEFA also rejected Benfica's Prestianni appeal — he won't play. Madrid's narrow aggregate lead is under real threat.
⚽ Wed 21:00 — Juventus vs Galatasaray: Juve need four goals, tie all but done
🎮 Fri 16:00 — rain (Nygaard) in ESL Pro League Season 23
